summary: Iteration 112: Tested two new features - Sales Duplicate Detection and Monthly Reconciliation Report. All 10 backend API tests passed. All UI components verified working.

issues: Console warnings about <tr> inside <span> and <span> inside <tbody> - React DOM nesting issue from dynamic rendering. Does not affect functionality.

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tested with existing sales data that has known duplicates on dates: 2026-02-11, 2026-02-15, 2026-02-16, 2026-02-17, 2026-02-27, 2026-02-28
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 112 verified all requested features for Sales Duplicate Detection and Monthly Reconciliation Report.

1_sales_duplicate_day_rows.details: Day rows with duplicate entries (same branch + same amount) have orange background and 'Duplicate' badge with AlertTriangle icon. Found 6 duplicate warnings on dates: 2026-02-11, 2026-02-15, 2026-02-16, 2026-02-17, 2026-02-27, 2026-02-28

2_sales_duplicate_expanded_entries.details: When expanding a day with duplicates, individual duplicate entries have orange left border and 'Possible duplicate' badge with Copy icon. Found 7 individual duplicate badges in expanded view on Feb 11, 2026.

3_monthly_report_backend_api.details: GET /api/platform-reconciliation/monthly-report?months=3 returns correct structure with 'months' array and 'platforms' array. Each month entry has: month, month_name, platforms, total_sales, total_received, total_expected_fee, total_actual_cut, total_variance, order_count

4_monthly_report_platform_entry_structur.details: Each platform entry in a month has: platform_id, platform_name, commission_rate, total_sales, total_received, expected_fee, actual_cut, variance, sales_count

5_monthly_report_frontend_page.details: Page at /monthly-recon-report loads with title 'Monthly Reconciliation Report', grand totals cards (Total Sales, Total Received, Expected Fees, Actual Cut, Variance), months dropdown, and expandable monthly cards with platform details

6_monthly_report_expandable_cards.details: Found 6 month cards. Clicking a month expands to show platform breakdown table with columns: Platform, Rate, Orders, Sales, Received, Expected Fee, Actual Cut, Variance. March 2026 shows HungerStation (SAR 1,350.00, 20%) and Keta (SAR 150.00, 15%)

7_monthly_report_button_on_platform_reco.details: Platform Reconciliation page (/platform-reconciliation) has 'Monthly Report' button (data-testid='monthly-report-btn') that navigates to /monthly-recon-report when clicked

8_reports_hub_monthly_platform_card.details: Reports page has 'Monthly Platform Report' card with 'New' badge under Financial Reports section. Card navigates to /monthly-recon-report when clicked.

screenshots.sales_page_duplicates: Shows Sales page with orange duplicate badges on dates Feb 11, 15, 16, 17, 27, 28
screenshots.sales_expanded_duplicates: Shows expanded Feb 11 row with 7 individual 'Possible duplicate' badges
screenshots.platform_recon_page: Shows Platform Reconciliation page with Monthly Report button
screenshots.monthly_recon_report_page: Shows Monthly Reconciliation Report with grand totals and 6 month cards
screenshots.monthly_recon_expanded: Shows March 2026 expanded with HungerStation and Keta platform rows
screenshots.reports_hub: Shows Reports hub with Monthly Platform Report card under Financial Reports
